use_cases: A container component for displaying grouped content sections
Building card-based layouts and dashboard interfaces
Organizing related information in a contained visual unit
Creating consistent card structures across web applications
Displaying contextual information with headers, content, and footers
ai_summary: A foundational UI component from shadcn/ui that provides a versatile card container with distinct sections for headers, titles, descriptions, content, and footers. It uses minimal styling with a subtle shadow and border for a clean, flat aesthetic suitable for various interfaces.
